contract.signalTiming: last tradable session on or before each calendar month's last Friday
contract.exit: sell 50% at 6 months; extend remainder only when weekly close >= MA10 and RSI14 >= 50; then exit after two weekly closes below MA10 or at 12 months
contract.ramp: first six buy signals 10% of current equity per pick; then 7.5%; use 5% when cash ratio <= 10%
